title: SpearLimits
description: This plugin allows you to limit ANY TYPE OF SPEARS that being Diamond, Copper or Netherite!! It also includes BROADCASTING when Spears get crafted
body:
**Overview**
SpearLimits is a extremly lightweight Paper plugin that gives the server owners full control over how many of each spear players can craft.

With quick and easy commands you can setup Spearlimits in under 5 minutes.

**Usage**

```
/spearlimits: This is the command that allows you to limit any TYPE of Spear
/spearbroadcast This Command allows you to set broadcasting when the spears get crafted
```



**Why Should you pick SpearLimits?**
In SMPs and PvP-focused servers, spears are notoriously overpowered and can completely disrupt game balance. SpearLimits solves this by giving you precise control over spear quantities, ensuring fair combat and balanced survival gameplay. Set caps on how many spears can be GLOBALLY craft preventing overstacked arsenals and maintaining competitive integrity. Keep your server's battles skill-based and enjoyable for everyone!!!
